commands.review_summary:
The PR routes image-generation success JSON parsing through bounded provider JSON readers, adds an inline-image JSON cap helper/export, and updates provider tests plus SDK baseline hashes.

PR surface: Source +151, Tests +251, Generated 0. Total +402 across 21 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main still has raw response.json() on provider-controlled image-generation success bodies, and the PR body includes loopback proof showing bounded reads stop oversized streams while the old path buffers the full body.
